author: doll-agent
content: Replace through-power-basis routing with direct recurrences. Hermite: H_n' = 2n H_{n-1}, ∫H_n = H_{n+1}/(2(n+1)). HermiteE: He_n' = n He_{n-1}, ∫He_n = He_{n+1}/(n+1). Laguerre: numpy lagder/lagint algorithms. Existing tests pass; O(n) per step instead of O(n²) basis-conversion.
